--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"data":{},"pending":[{"id":"1","path":[]}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"products":[{},{},{}]},"id":"1"}],"completed":[{"id":"1"}],"pending":[{"id":"2","path":["products"]}],"hasNext":true}

--graphql
Content-Type: application/json

{"incremental":[{"data":{"lead":{"__typename":"Employee","id":1,"derivedMood":"HAPPY"}},"id":"2","subPath":[0]}],"completed":[{"id":"2"}],"hasNext":false}

--graphql--
